text:
Once upon a time, in a small, charming town nestled among forests, there lived a curious cat named Whiskers. Whiskers wasn’t just any ordinary cat; she possessed an extraordinary ability: she could see the dreams of animals.

One crisp autumn morning, Whiskers decided to head toward the old oak tree near the river. She knew that dreams often fluttered there. As she pounced gracefully up the gnarled trunk, she spotted a tiny golden-eyed owl tucked inside a hollow.

The owl blinked sleepily. "Hello," it murmured. "You must be tired. I’m Dreamie."

Whiskers listened intently. Dreamie had just dreamed of a garden full of fireworks that never blazed—the stars lit without flame. "That sounds lovely," Whiskers thought.

That night, Whiskers dreamed that she was a sunflower. She could feel the warmth of the sun all day long. Dreams were her favorite playground.

When Dawn arrived,
